title: A system and method for tracking digital assets in a digital ecosystem
abstract: A system for tracking assets in a digital ecosystem, said system comprising: a signal configuration mechanism to define and / or receive a variety of signals in accordance with a pre-defined signal template with a digital fingerprint signal as an output; a digital asset creator (12) to create a digital asset; a metadata tagger (14) to tag metadata to said created digital asset and to upload said digital asset, with said signal, for broadcast; a digital asset link unique identifier database (16) to store data pertaining to each of said created digital assets, said data comprising a digital asset link identity, a fingerprint, a hash code, and a link; and a fingerprinting mechanism (18) to create a fingerprint per digital asset, each digital asset on different servers having different links, each digital asset checked with respect to stored digital asset link identity and stored fingerprint from a fingerprint database (20).
claims:
Claims Claims: 1. A system for tracking assets in a digital ecosystem, said system comprising: - a signal configuration mechanism configured to define and / or receive a variety of signals and to set up each of said signals in accordance with a pre-defined signal template, said pre-defined signal template providing a digital fingerprint signal as an output; - a digital asset creator(12) configured to create a digital asset with said signal in said pre-defined signal template; - a metadata tagger (14)configured to tag metadata to said created digital asset and configured to upload said digital asset, with said signal, for broadcast; - a digital asset link unique identifier database (16)configured to store data pertaining to each of said created digital assets, said data comprising a digital asset link identity for each created digital asset, a fingerprint for each created digital asset, a hash code for each created digital asset, and a link for each created digital asset; and - a finger printing mechanism(18)configured to create a fingerprint per digital asset and store it in said digital asset link unique identifier database (16), each digital asset on different servers having different links, each digital asset being checked with respect to said stored digital asset link identity and stored fingerprint from a fingerprint database (20). 2. The system as claimed in claim 1, wherein said digital asset being of a video asset, an audio asset, or a multimedia asset. 3. The system as claimed in claim 1 , wherein a user (22) accesses an SDK file (24) of said system which, in turn, accesses another SDK file (26) from an outsider ratingsâ database (30). 4. The system as claimed in claim 1 , wherein a database (28) of said system comprises links associated, for identification using the fingerprint, with the signal (fingerprint) which are accessed by said systemâs SDK. 5. The system as claimed in claim 1 , wherein a database (28) of said system comprises a list of distinct links associated with digital assets. 6. The system as claimed in claim 1 , wherein said system comprises a digital asset link unique identifier database (16) comprising a list of unique digital link identifiers associated with digital assets. 7. The system as claimed in claim 1, wherein said system comprises: - a database (28) comprising a list of unique digital links associated with each of said digital assets; - a digital asset link unique identifier database (16) comprising a list of unique digital link identifiers associated with each of said digital assets; - a first querying mechanism (42) configured to query the presence of a hashcode from a digital asset while it is being broadcast or played in order to checks if a determined hashcode, from said queried digital asset, is present in said digital asset link unique identifier database (16); - a hashcode generating mechanism (44)configured to generate a hashcode, per unique digital asset link identifier per digital asset, and to store said generated hashcode in a hashcode database (46), if no hashcode is present, which is then 

 retrieved by a second querying mechanism (48) which queries for a fingerprint of a digital asset before being broadcast or played, said second querying mechanism (48) configured to run a fingerprint query, on said broadcast or played digital asset, in order to retrieve a fingerprint from a digital asset to check it with a reference fingerprint from a reference database (46) in order to check for authenticity, said fingerprint comprises a digital asset link unique identifier (for a link of the digital asset source) along with a hashcode; - a mapping mechanism (50) configured to map metadata of said digital asset with respect to an external database and to further compare for data from said hashcode generating mechanism (44) with said hashcode database (46) in order to determine, as an output, as to how much of a digital asset has been broadcast or played. 8. The system as claimed in claim 1 , wherein said digital asset link identifier may comprise multiple hashcodes, each hashcode being representative of a source of a digital asset in the digital ecosystem. Therefore, even if a URL is duplicate, a hashcode provides the digitalâ s identity and tracks it. 9. The system as claimed in claim 1, wherein said signal being selected from a group of signals consisting of an advertiser code signal, a brand code signal, an agency code signal, a product category code signal, a copy code signal, a duration signal, a language signal, and an advertisement quality signal.
